subcodes.first_line: The breezes of utterance have wafted, and the fragrance of divine knowledge hath been diffused; the Sun of unity hath dawned, and the Moon of singleness hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سرت نسمات البیان و تضوع عرف العرفان و اشرقت شمس التوحید و لاح قمر التفرید
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
